narrative:
Ismaïla Sarr is a standout Right Winger for Senegal. His overall rating of 7.48/10 places him in the top 1% of right wingers at this tournament. This high rating reflects strong form, with 71% derived from his club performances over the last two seasons.

Sarr's attacking output at this World Cup is exceptional, registering 0.984 goals per 90 minutes and 0.908 expected goals per 90 minutes. He is also taking 3.197 shots per 90 minutes, demonstrating his direct threat. While contributing 0.246 assists per 90 minutes, his expected assists of 0.068 per 90 minutes suggest his current assist numbers might be slightly overperforming underlying creative volume. His defensive contributions are minimal, with only 0.246 tackles per 90 minutes.

Sarr is clearly a primary offensive weapon for Senegal, driving significant goal contributions. Scouts should continue to monitor his incredible goal-scoring rate and high shot volume. It will be important to observe if his assist numbers remain elevated despite a lower expected assists figure. His overall impact as a top-tier right winger will be crucial for his team's tournament prospects.
